raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "SB 150 will embed workforce and community benefit requirements into contracting related to federal infrastructure programs.",
    "The Infrastructure and Investment Jobs Act (IIJA), the Inflation Reduction Act (IRA), and the CHIPS and Science Act (CHIPS Act) will collectively invest approximately $752 billion into infrastructure improvements.",
    "The investments from these federal programs will improve public access to clean drinking water and affordable high-speed internet.",
    "SB 150 aims to promote equitable access to jobs in federally-supported industries.",
    "The legislation is intended to help California reach its climate change goals.",
    "SB 150 aims to connect sustainable industry growth to high-quality jobs.",
    "The legislation is expected to foster innovation in California's workforce.",
    "SB 150 requires projects over $35 million in value to focus on helping local communities.",
    "The bill aims to create equitable job programs for working families, especially in low-income communities of color.",
    "SB 150 will help historically marginalized communities realize the full benefits of infrastructure projects.",
    "The legislation seeks to ensure that federal funds create high-road jobs in communities, particularly for historically disenfranchised groups.",
    "SB 150 provides a unique opportunity to promote equity in access to high-paying construction and manufacturing careers."
  ]
}
```
